MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-17-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE ENTIRE COMPLAINT AND AS TO THE FIRST (AND ONLY) CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT. PLAINTIFF HAS ALLEGED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT, INCLUDING THE ESSENTIAL TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT, THE ALLEGED BREACH ON OR ABOUT DECEMBER 6, 2012, AND DAMAGES. THE COMPLAINT IS NOT UNCERTAIN. THE COURT HAS JURISDICTION TO HEAR THIS MATTER. THE TERMS OF THE WRITTEN AGREEMENT, AS ALLEGED ON THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT OR MATTERS THAT ARE SUBJECT TO JUDICIAL NOTICE, DO NOT STATE THAT PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO DEMAND ARBITRATION. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED AS TO EXHIBIT C, AND OTHERWISE OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S PROCEDURAL REMEDY, IF IT CHOOSES, IS TO MOVE TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
ORDER OVERRULING DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KRONENBERG, WILLIAM SCOTT SUBSTITUTED FOR KRONENBERG, WILLIAM SCOTT AS ATTORNEY FOR KNAPP, TRECIA

Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Stay Action
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Stay Action IS Granted, in light of the Court's order granting the petition to compel arbitration of this matter. No opposition was filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Stay Action
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Continued To Nov-13-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Stay Action is continued on the Court's motion to November 13, 2013 to be heard on the same date as Defendant's petition to compel arbitration in Case No. CPF-13-513223. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Nancy Sandoval Allard, Esq. of the Law Office of Catherine A. Walsh, Tel. 925.825.9500, for defendant and moving party;
Matthew J. Kracht, Esq. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney, Tel. 415.788.1900.ext.2815, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled as to the entire complaint and as to the first (and only) cause of action for breach of contract. Plaintiff has alleged sufficient facts to state a cause of action for breach of contract, including the essential terms of the agreement, the alleged breach on or about December 6, 2012, and damages. The Complaint is not uncertain. The Court has jurisdiction to hear this matter. The terms of the written agreement, as alleged on the face of the Complaint or matters that are subject to judicial notice, do not state that Plaintiff is required to demand arbitration. Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted as to Exhibit C, and otherwise overruled. Defendant's procedural remedy, if it chooses, is to move to compel arbitration. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Continued To Oct-30-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Continued To Sep-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to September 19, 2013, on the Court's motion. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
